title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6876, ENTITLED âAN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN BARANGAY SI-IT, MUNICIPALITY OF TANUDAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA-APAYAO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TANUDAN MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORâ

chunks.text:
H. No. 5396; 109 OG No. 46, 7750 (November 18, 2013); Manila Bulletin, September 9, 2013

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10619, September 03, 2013 ]

AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6876, ENTITLED âAN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN BARANGAY SI-IT, MUNICIPALITY OF TANUDAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA-APAYAO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TANUDAN MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORâ

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 1 of Republic Act No. 6876 is hereby amended to read as follows:

âSECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Department of Health, a ten-bed municipal hospital in Sitio Banagao, Poblacion Mangali, Municipality of Tanudan, Province of Kalinga, to be known as the Tanudan Municipal Hospital.â

SEC. 2. Section 4 of the same Act is hereby amended to read as follows:

âSEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a newspaper of general circulation.â

SEC. 3. The title of Republic Act No. 6876 is hereby amended to read as follows:

âAn Act Establishing a Municipal Hospital in Sitio Banagao, Poblacion Mangali, Municipality of Tanudan, Province of Kalinga, to be known as the Tanudan Municipal Hospital, and Appropriating Funds Thereforâ.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JINGGOY EJERCITO ESTRADA

Acting Senate President

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 13, 2011 and June 6, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: SEPT 03 2013

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
